g.text: 📍MHA doesn't know the order of input vectors. To account
for that each input vector is summed with a [[positional
encoding]] vectors. This allows transformer to understand
in which order input vectors were supplied
📍From N input vectors a matrix is formed and this matrix is
supplied as queries, keys and values to the [[multi-head
attention]]. The drawing on the left shows an unwrapped
version of that process. Each vector acts as a query for
different multihead attention blocks. And all vectors act as keys
It is ONE FC layer. It is applied as a
function to every vector. It has only
one set of trainable parameters W1, b1
